2. [ ] Query PubMed for "erythritol GWAS" and related metabolomics GWAS papers.

print(pubmed_result)
</execute>1. [✓] Query the GWAS Catalog for "erythritol" to retrieve associations. (completed)
2. [✓] Query PubMed for "erythritol GWAS" and related metabolomics GWAS papers. (completed)

5. [✓] Fetch Shin et al. 2014 supplementary PDFs and search for "erythritol". (completed)
6. [✓] Query GWAS Catalog study GCST004057 associations and identify erythritol-associated variant (1:155162067 G>T -> rs11789603). (completed)
7. [✓] Check provided variant list for direct erythritol associations (none found). (completed)
8. [✓] Select the most plausible candidate from the provided list based on presence in metabolomics GWAS resources and study pages. (completed)

Final answer:
<solution>rs2000999</solution>
